title: 4mm Round Cable Clips 100pcs Assortment Cable Holder Management Wire Tidy Clips
features: 【4 mm】4 mm circle cable clip with steel nail. Pack of 100 pcs per size. It can easily organize a variety of specifications of wires.

【Durable & Sturdiness】Our round cable clips use environmental protection PE material, Weather Resistant, Impact Resistant, Corrosion Resistant, good insulation and not easy aging. The cable clips also uses high performance steel nail, durable and sturdiness.
【Easy to Use and Install】The installation steps of the wire clip is very simple, just use a hammer to nail them to the wall or other, then you will get a neat, comfortable and safe environment.

【Widely applicable】These durable cable clips can be used for RG8X, RG58, RG59 or LMR 240 coax cable, RG6 digital video or audio coaxial cable, RJ45 Ethernet Cat 5, Cat 6 network cable, 12 to 16 AWG speaker wire, phone wire, USB cable, etc. No matter indoor or outdoor.

【Organized & Tidy】As a useful tools with various size, it’s ideal for home and office various cable management. It will keep your children and pets from hurting by messy cables. And provide you a cleaner and safer living space.
